abilities.name: Deranged Transformation
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 1 to wound rolls for its attacks.

abilities.name: Royal Bodyguard
abilities.effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for friendly **HEROES** that are wholly within this unit’s combat range.

abilities.name: Predator's Pounce
abilities.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses **RETREAT** abilities.

abilities.name: Victory Feast
abilities.effect: If any models were slain by this unit this turn, **Heal (D6)** this unit, and this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.

enhancements.name: Defenders of the Realm
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units that are contesting an objective you control.

enhancements.name: Crusading Army
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units.

enhancements.name: Delusion of the Sentinel
enhancements.effect: While you believe this **DELUSION**, add 1 to ward rolls for friendly units while each model in the unit is contesting an objective.

enhancements.name: Delusion of the Hunter
enhancements.effect: While you believe this **DELUSION**, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while no models in the unit are contesting an objective.

enhancements.name: Blood-river Chalice
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

enhancements.name: Ulguan Cloak
enhancements.effect: Your general is not visible to enemy models that are more than 12" away from them.

enhancements.name: Crimson Victuals
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, if your **Cryptguard** unit is within 6" of the target, you can return 1 slain model to your **Cryptguard** unit for each damage point allocated by this ability.

enhancements.name: Rousing Oration
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice for each friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. Do not roll a dice for your general. For each 5+, give 1 **noble deeds point** to your general.

enhancements.name: Almost Lucid
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Delusions and Madness’ ability
enhancements.effect: You can re-roll the delusion roll.

enhancements.name: Companion of the Hunt
enhancements.effect: If your general is not in combat, they can move 3". They cannot move into combat during any part of that move.

enhancements.name: A Worthy Challenge
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit that started the battle with 3 or fewer models and is in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Your opponent must decide whether the target will accept or refuse your general’s challenge. If they **accept**, for the rest of the phase, when your general and the target are picked to use a **FIGHT** ability, all of their attacks must target each other. If they **refuse**, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Choirmaster
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of friendly units’ ranged weapons for attacks that target that enemy unit.

battleTraits.name: Delusions and Madness
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: You must use this ability at the start of each battle round. If it is the first battle round, pick a **DELUSION**. Otherwise, make a delusion roll by rolling a D6.
battleTraits.effect: On a 1-3, you must pick a different **DELUSION** to the one you picked last time. On a 4+, you must pick the same **DELUSION** as last time. For the rest of the battle round, you believe the **DELUSION** you picked.

battleTraits.name: Delusion of the Great Feast
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: If you believe this **DELUSION**, pick each friendly unit on the battlefield to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: **Heal (1)** each target. If the target is a **SERFS** unit, return D3 slain models to it instead.

battleTraits.name: Delusion of the Knightly Host
battleTraits.effect: While you believe this **DELUSION**, if the unmodified charge roll for a friendly **HERO** or **KNIGHTS** unit is 8+, add 1 to hit rolls for that unit’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Feeding Frenzy
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly **HEROES** that have 6 **noble deeds points**.

battleTraits.name: Noble Deeds
battleTraits.effect: Each time a friendly **HERO** uses a **FIGHT** ability, after its attacks have been resolved, give that **HERO** a number of **noble deeds points** equal to the number of damage points allocated by that ability. Each **HERO** can have a maximum of 6 **noble deeds points** at any time.

battleTraits.name: Summon Loyal Subjects
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **HERO** with any **noble deeds points** to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect:
Spend any number of that **HERO**’s **noble deeds points** as follows:

Pick a friendly **Cryptguard** unit within 9" of this unit and spend 1 **noble deeds point** to return 1 model to that unit.

Pick a friendly **Morbheg Knights** unit within 9" of this unit and spend 2 **noble deeds points** to return 1 model to that unit.
